257.issue_title: Reorder workflow phases: research → design → planning → tdd

deliverables.description: Settings.from_env() introduced; Settings.load() deleted
Module-level singleton 'settings = Settings.load()' removed from settings.py
MCP_LOG_LEVEL renamed to LOG_LEVEL in settings.py and conftest.py
server.py calls Settings.from_env() at composition root; injects into core/logging.py + cli.py

cycles.exit_criteria: test_c_settings_structural.py: 3 passed; Select-String 'settings = Settings.load()' -> 0; Select-String 'MCP_LOG_LEVEL' -> 0; full suite green

deliverables.description: Module-level 'workflow_config = WorkflowConfig.load()' removed from workflows.py and all direct workflow_config importers rewired
11 remaining Settings singleton consumers rewired to accept settings: Settings param via DI
.vscode/mcp.json created with LOG_LEVEL, MCP_SERVER_NAME, GITHUB_OWNER, GITHUB_REPO, GITHUB_PROJECT_NUMBER env entries
Zero residual singleton imports for settings and workflow_config anywhere in codebase

cycles.exit_criteria: Select-String 'from mcp_server.config.settings import settings' -> 0; Select-String 'from mcp_server.config.workflows import workflow_config' -> 0; Select-String 'workflow_config = WorkflowConfig.load()' -> 0; .vscode/mcp.json exists; full suite green; run_quality_gates green

deliverables.description: ConfigLoader(config_root: Path) introduced in config/loader.py with load_*() methods for the first 5 target schemas
mcp_server/config/schemas/ directory created with __init__.py
5 low-coupling schemas moved to config/schemas/: GitConfig, LabelConfig, ScopeConfig, WorkflowConfig, WorkphasesConfig; legacy public loader API retained temporarily until later consumer rewires
test_c_loader_structural.py written with initial ConfigLoader and fail-fast guards; deletion-focused guards deferred to later C_LOADER cycles

cycles.exit_criteria: config/loader.py exists; config/schemas/ with __init__.py; first 5 schema files exist under config/schemas/; initial structural tests pass; full suite green

deliverables.description: 10 remaining schemas moved to config/schemas/ incl. ArtifactRegistryConfig, EnforcementConfig, PhaseContractsConfig
EnforcementConfig and PhaseContractsConfig extracted from managers/ to config/schemas/
ConfigLoader exposes load_* methods for all 15 schemas, including enforcement and phase contracts
Local ConfigError class in scaffold_metadata_config.py deleted; uses core.exceptions.ConfigError

cycles.exit_criteria: ConfigLoader covers extracted schemas; Select-String 'class EnforcementConfig|class PhaseContractsConfig' managers/ -> 0; full suite green

deliverables.description: 14 tool and validator entry-point files rewired: pr_tools, cycle_tools, git_tools, project_tools, label_tools, issue_tools, phase_tools, discovery_tools, git_pull_tool, git_fetch_tool, git_analysis_tools, quality_tools, validation_tools, scaffold_artifact; no direct config loads or fallback manager construction that depends on self-loading config

7 manager files rewired: git_manager, phase_state_engine, artifact_manager, qa_manager, phase_contract_resolver, enforcement_runner, project_manager receive config via DI; no direct config imports remain in managers/
PolicyEngine constructor receives configs via DI; reload() uses ConfigLoader; directory_policy_resolver mandatory param
scaffolding/metadata.py and scaffolders/template_scaffolder.py receive config via DI; no .from_file(

artifact_test_harness.py and workflow_fixtures.py rewritten to use ConfigLoader(tmp_path) pattern; no reset_instance

server.py full composition root: ConfigLoader(config_root) + all 15 load_*() + all managers + PolicyEngine + GitHubManager instantiated with DI
